name: Impossible Pumpkin Pie - 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a pie plate measuring 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
3. Beat all ingredients together in a blender on high speed for 1 minute, or until smooth. If your blender does not hold 5 cups, transfer the mixture to a mixing bowl and beat with a mixer on medium speed for about 2 minutes until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pie plate.
5. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Serves 8.
High Altitude Directions (3500 to 6500 ft): Bake for approximately 55 minutes.
